title: juncus leiospermus
intro: Juncus leiospermus, also known as Soft-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus leiospermus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention. Juncus leiospermus is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is also used in some herbal remedies to promote digestive health.
